name: beevibe
description: Beevibe Claude Code plugins for sharing, researching, and coordinating AI agent work.

plugins.name: crystal
plugins.description: Beevibe Crystal - publish your current Claude Code session as a queryable capsule. Visitors get a share URL; the capsule answers in your voice with the full session as context.

plugins.name: adr
plugins.description: Architecture Deep Research - scan a repo, draft a PRD, run live deep research, and get a cited handoff for system-design decisions.
